assertions.text: Uses claudit index create or claudit index list-symbols rather than manually grepping source files
assertions.evidence: Agent ran claudit index create (got 'exists') then claudit index list-symbols returning 12,062 symbols. No manual grep used.

assertions.text: Returns a structured list of symbols from the project
assertions.evidence: Got 12,062 symbols and organized them into subsystems: OAuth2/token, authentication, SCIM, IdP, audit, etc.
